## Meeting Purpose

[Sync between GrowthX and Homebase teams to discuss ongoing SEO projects, updates, and future plans.](https://fathom.video/share/U623yq-SECZ5C-JRxtsFd1RuEsh6FoiV?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Homebase completed a comprehensive site audit, informing their roadmap for the rest of the year and into next year](https://fathom.video/share/U623yq-SECZ5C-JRxtsFd1RuEsh6FoiV?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)
  - [GrowthX is finalizing a Looker dashboard for Homebase, providing detailed SEO metrics and insights](https://fathom.video/share/U623yq-SECZ5C-JRxtsFd1RuEsh6FoiV?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [TLDR workflow for blog posts is refined and ready for implementation](https://fathom.video/share/U623yq-SECZ5C-JRxtsFd1RuEsh6FoiV?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [New content initiatives discussed, including a Q\&A section for small business owners and AI summary buttons for blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/U623yq-SECZ5C-JRxtsFd1RuEsh6FoiV?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)

## Topics

### Site Audit and SEO Strategy

  - [Homebase completed a thorough site audit, analyzing technical aspects and content](https://fathom.video/share/U623yq-SECZ5C-JRxtsFd1RuEsh6FoiV?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)
  - [Findings will guide their roadmap for the rest of 2025 and into 2026](https://fathom.video/share/U623yq-SECZ5C-JRxtsFd1RuEsh6FoiV?tab=summary&timestamp=32.0)
  - [Focus areas include technical fixes, content refreshes, and structural changes to top-performing pages](https://fathom.video/share/U623yq-SECZ5C-JRxtsFd1RuEsh6FoiV?tab=summary&timestamp=44.0)
  - [Team is developing a framework for identifying content refresh opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/U623yq-SECZ5C-JRxtsFd1RuEsh6FoiV?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)

### Looker Dashboard Development

  - [GrowthX is creating a customized Looker dashboard for Homebase](https://fathom.video/share/U623yq-SECZ5C-JRxtsFd1RuEsh6FoiV?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Dashboard includes non-branded clicks/impressions, cohort analysis by content clusters, and landing page performance](https://fathom.video/share/U623yq-SECZ5C-JRxtsFd1RuEsh6FoiV?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [Still working on integrating GA4 data and adding Homebase-specific tabs (e.g., glossary performance)](https://fathom.video/share/U623yq-SECZ5C-JRxtsFd1RuEsh6FoiV?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [Team discussing additional metrics to include, such as refresh opportunities for glossary content](https://fathom.video/share/U623yq-SECZ5C-JRxtsFd1RuEsh6FoiV?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)

### TLDR Workflow and Content Updates

  - [TLDR workflow for blog posts has been refined and is ready for implementation](https://fathom.video/share/U623yq-SECZ5C-JRxtsFd1RuEsh6FoiV?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Team to review and approve final edits before rolling out to more posts](https://fathom.video/share/U623yq-SECZ5C-JRxtsFd1RuEsh6FoiV?tab=summary&timestamp=1043.0)
  - [Discussion on updating publish dates for refreshed content (H1 headers, not URLs)](https://fathom.video/share/U623yq-SECZ5C-JRxtsFd1RuEsh6FoiV?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)
  - [New glossary terms approved, with minor adjustments needed for category tags](https://fathom.video/share/U623yq-SECZ5C-JRxtsFd1RuEsh6FoiV?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)

### New Content Initiatives

  - [Homebase planning a "question center" for small business owners](https://fathom.video/share/U623yq-SECZ5C-JRxtsFd1RuEsh6FoiV?tab=summary&timestamp=1504.0)
  - [Considering structure (individual pages vs. FAQ-style) to balance SEO potential and content depth](https://fathom.video/share/U623yq-SECZ5C-JRxtsFd1RuEsh6FoiV?tab=summary&timestamp=1628.0)
  - [Exploring implementation of AI summary buttons on blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/U623yq-SECZ5C-JRxtsFd1RuEsh6FoiV?tab=summary&timestamp=1895.0)
  - [Team discussing potential for controlling branding and messaging in AI-generated summaries](https://fathom.video/share/U623yq-SECZ5C-JRxtsFd1RuEsh6FoiV?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)

### LLM and AI Impact on SEO

  - [Noted significant drop in ChatGPT referral traffic across industries](https://fathom.video/share/U623yq-SECZ5C-JRxtsFd1RuEsh6FoiV?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
  - [Discussing strategies for adapting content to AI-generated overviews in search results](https://fathom.video/share/U623yq-SECZ5C-JRxtsFd1RuEsh6FoiV?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
  - [Considering date visibility on content to potentially influence LLM citations](https://fathom.video/share/U623yq-SECZ5C-JRxtsFd1RuEsh6FoiV?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to share Looker dashboard access with Homebase team](https://fathom.video/share/U623yq-SECZ5C-JRxtsFd1RuEsh6FoiV?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
  - [Homebase to provide final copy edits for TLDR examples](https://fathom.video/share/U623yq-SECZ5C-JRxtsFd1RuEsh6FoiV?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)
  - [GrowthX to implement approved TLDRs and update publish dates on refreshed content](https://fathom.video/share/U623yq-SECZ5C-JRxtsFd1RuEsh6FoiV?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Homebase team to review content generation artifacts when time allows](https://fathom.video/share/U623yq-SECZ5C-JRxtsFd1RuEsh6FoiV?tab=summary&timestamp=1439.0)
  - [Jakub to continue work on refresh targets, pending published dates information](https://fathom.video/share/U623yq-SECZ5C-JRxtsFd1RuEsh6FoiV?tab=summary&timestamp=1460.0)
  - [GrowthX to research examples and best practices for AI summary buttons on blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/U623yq-SECZ5C-JRxtsFd1RuEsh6FoiV?tab=summary&timestamp=1933.0)
  - [Teams to stay connected on LinkedIn following Jess's departure from GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/U623yq-SECZ5C-JRxtsFd1RuEsh6FoiV?tab=summary&timestamp=1967.0)
